comment: Per-customer field overrides — applied AFTER build_customer_profiles.mjs and AFTER the Sync-sheet enrichment, so they win over whatever the ETL inferred. Used when source data is wrong, ambiguous, or stale (e.g. a Stripe customer ID that HubSpot misattributes to a different company, a typo in the Directory column, an owner that needs to be reassigned). Each override is keyed by allmoxy_customer_id. Manage via _etl_scripts/edit_customer.mjs (don't edit by hand unless you know the field name).

16._note: Sync sheet currently labels aid 16 as Cabinet Warehouse — core says Door Company
